name: Quick & Easy Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 Hershey's unsweetened baking chocolate (1 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: www.hersheys.com
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Grease and flour a 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine the chocolate, butter, and boiling water. Stir with a spoon until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth.
4. Add the flour, sugar, sour cream, eggs, baking soda, salt, and vanilla to the bowl. Beat on low speed of an electric mixer until the batter is smooth.
5. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
6. Bake for 35 to 40 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Allow the cake to cool completely in the pan on a wire rack.
8. Frost as desired. Serves 12 to 15.
